name: Caste Certificate
description: Documentary proof belonging to SC, ST, or OBC, required to claim reservations in education and government jobs.
eligibility: Belong to a recognized SC/ST/OBC category in the state.
application_steps: Apply via the State's e-District portal or Revenue Department.
Fill the caste certificate application form.
Upload proof of caste (e.g., relative's certificate, school extract).
For OBC, upload income proof to verify Non-Creamy Layer status.
Submit the application and wait for verification by the Tehsildar.

required_documents.name: Proof of Caste
required_documents.purpose: To verify the applicant's caste lineage.

required_documents.name: Income Proof (For OBC NCL)
required_documents.purpose: Required only for OBC applicants to prove Non-Creamy Layer status.

common_mistakes: Unable to produce a paternal relative's valid caste certificate.
OBC applicants failing to attach the Non-Creamy Layer declaration/income proof.
Applying in the wrong state (caste status varies by state).
